meaning: 苏瓦[南太平洋岛国斐济首都]
examples: Rumours in Suva, Fiji's capital, are swirling.
Suva, on the island of Viti Levu, is the capital.
Finally, Suva notes that Apple's market stats look undervalued compared to other, similar companies.
Whenever there is a lull in Suva's heavy tropical rains, every parked vehicle is festooned with clothes hanging out to dry.
Since pulling out of the Parliament complex, the rebels have established a base at Kalabu School, on the outskirts of Suva.
